title: viola × interjecta
intro: Viola × interjecta is a hybrid plant species within the viola genus, resulting from the cross between Viola sororia and Viola pubescens. The medicinal properties of Viola × interjecta lie in its roots and leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and improve overall health. Herbal preparations of Viola × interjecta include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat ailments such as sore throats, skin irritations, and wounds.
